payload: Step 1 feature flag system: 6 env-backed flags, tRPC query, 4 unit tests passing
Step 2 portal slug: nullable column + unique index, shared slug utility, service/repo integration, backfill script, 15 unit tests passing
Step 3 branch portal route group: (branch)/branch/[portalSlug] layout with flag gate, auth, portalSlug resolution, org ownership check, placeholder page. Typecheck, lint, 22 tests pass.

Step 4 branch portal nav: sidebar with 5 nav items + branch switcher + Owner Console link, bottom nav for mobile, branch.listAccessible tRPC, DashboardShell wiring. 33 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

Step 5 branch portal pages: overview (BranchForm + snapshot), orders (list + detail), menu (full CRUD), tables (list + dialogs), settings (hours + QR + ordering). BranchPortalProvider context wired. 33 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

Step 6 owner sidebar v2: five flat groups (Setup, Overview, Restaurants, Branch Ops placeholder, Team Access placeholder, Account). Layout conditionally renders v2/v1 based on FF_OWNER_CONSOLE_SIDEBAR_V2. 9 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.
Step 7 workspace switcher: DropdownMenu in sidebar-v2 header, Zustand workspace store, flag-gated via showWorkspaceSwitcher prop. 15 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

Step 8 branch shortcuts: BranchShortcuts component in sidebar-v2 with listAccessible data, workspace filtering, portal slug links, 10-item limit, fallback URLs. 23 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

Step 9 team access data model: team_membership + scoped_assignment + team_invite schemas, repos, services, factory, DTOs, errors, router stub, migration 0005. 31 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

Step 10a team invite flow backend: InviteService (create/list/revoke/validate), AcceptInviteUseCase (transactional), 5 invite router procedures, 2 new error classes, 4 new DTO schemas. 26 new tests, 57 total pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

Step 10b team invite landing page: /register/team with dual auth flow (unauth shows sign-up/in CTAs, auth shows accept button), publicOverrides in getRouteType, enriched validate response with org/branch names. 24 new tests, 137 total pass, lint+typecheck clean.

Step 11 team access UI: members page with role/scope badges + invite dialog, invites page with status/expiry display, sidebar wired with Members+Invites links, enriched router (profile+assignments+scope names), revokeMember procedure. 18 new tests, 155 total pass, lint+typecheck clean.

Step 12 branch-scoped auth: layout uses AssignmentService.getAccessLevel when branchScopedStaffAccess flag on, falls back to org-ownership when off. accessLevel exposed in BranchPortalProvider context. 10 new tests, 165 total pass, lint+typecheck clean.
